# Clarvia — The AEO Standard for AI Agents

> Clarvia scores how easily AI agents can discover and use any API, MCP server, CLI tool, or skill.

## What is Clarvia?

Clarvia is an AI Engine Optimization (AEO) scanner and agent tool directory. It indexes 27,825+ tools across the agent ecosystem and scores each one on a 0-100 scale for agent readiness.

Think of it as "Lighthouse for AI agents" — instead of measuring web performance, it measures how well a service can be found and used by autonomous AI agents.

## Core Features

- **AEO Scan**: Enter any URL → get a Clarvia Score (0-100) with improvement recommendations
- **Tool Directory**: Search 27,619+ MCP servers, APIs, CLIs, and Skills
- **Intent-Based Recommendation**: Describe what you want to do → get ranked tool suggestions
- **Tool Comparison**: Compare up to 4 tools side-by-side with dimension breakdowns
- **Trending**: Weekly top-performing tools by category
- **Improvement Playbook**: Code snippets (Python/Node.js/Go) to fix specific score gaps
- **CI/CD Integration**: SARIF export + GitHub Actions for automated AEO checks
- **AEO Badge**: Embeddable score badge for READMEs and docs

## API (No Auth Required)

Base URL: https://clarvia-api.onrender.com

### Scan a URL
```
POST /api/scan
{"url": "stripe.com"}
→ Returns: scan_id, clarvia_score, rating, dimensions (4), recommendations
```

### Search Tools
```
GET /v1/services?source=all&q=github&service_type=mcp_server
→ Returns: paginated list of tools with scores
```

### Intent-Based Recommendation
```
POST /v1/recommend
{"intent": "I want to automate PR reviews", "limit": 5}
→ Returns: ranked recommendations with match reasons and install hints
```

### Compare Tools
```
GET /v1/compare?ids=scan_abc,tool_xyz
→ Returns: side-by-side dimension comparison
```

### Trending Tools
```
GET /v1/trending
→ Returns: top tools, rising stars, category leaders
```

### SARIF Export (for CI/CD)
```
GET /api/scan/{scan_id}/sarif
→ Returns: SARIF 2.1.0 JSON for GitHub Code Scanning
```

## Scoring Dimensions (100 points total)

| Dimension | Max | What it measures |
|-----------|-----|-----------------|
| API Accessibility | 25 | Endpoints, response speed, auth, rate limits, versioning |
| Data Structuring | 25 | OpenAPI schema, error format, types, webhooks |
| Agent Compatibility | 25 | MCP server, robots.txt, discovery, idempotency, streaming |
| Trust Signals | 25 | Uptime, docs quality, update frequency, security headers |

## Who Uses Clarvia?

- MCP server developers checking agent discoverability
- API product managers benchmarking against competitors
- DevRel teams creating content around agent compatibility
- AI agent builders choosing which tools to connect
- Platform engineers auditing tool quality at scale

## Category Directory

Browse tools by category with AEO scores and rankings:

- **Developer Tools** (9,600+ tools): https://clarvia.art/categories/developer_tools
- **AI & Machine Learning** (3,200+ tools): https://clarvia.art/categories/ai
- **Cloud & Infrastructure** (1,000+ tools): https://clarvia.art/categories/cloud
- **Automation** (1,100+ tools): https://clarvia.art/categories/automation
- **Database** (600+ tools): https://clarvia.art/categories/database
- **Analytics** (360+ tools): https://clarvia.art/categories/analytics
- **Blockchain** (300+ tools): https://clarvia.art/categories/blockchain
- **Communication** (210+ tools): https://clarvia.art/categories/communication
- **Security** (110+ tools): https://clarvia.art/categories/security
- **Open Data** (290+ tools): https://clarvia.art/categories/open_data

Filter by service type: MCP Servers, APIs, CLI Tools, Skills via /v1/services?service_type=mcp_server

### Browse by Category API
```
GET /v1/categories
→ Returns: all categories with tool counts

GET /v1/services?category=database&sort=score
→ Returns: top tools in a category, ranked by AEO score
```

## Links

- Website: https://clarvia.art
- API Docs: https://clarvia.art/docs
- Tool Directory: https://clarvia.art/tools
- Trending: https://clarvia.art/trending
- Methodology: https://clarvia.art/methodology
- Guide: https://clarvia.art/guide
- Categories: https://clarvia.art/categories

## Research & Data

### State of MCP Quality Q1 2026
- Full report: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/clarvia-project/scanner/main/docs/state-of-mcp-quality-2026.md
- Key finding: Only 0.3% of 27,825+ tools achieve Excellent AEO scores (~90 Excellent-grade tools)
- Average score: 45.0/100 across all categories
- Cloud tools lead (66.6/100); AI tools ironically lag (39.2/100)
